credits.maintainers.kai.description.message: Lead maintainer of Subway Builder Modded. Oversees structure, updates, and content accuracy. Maintains the Spanish translation.

credits.maintainers.imb11.description.message: Writes and maintains the mod developing documentation as well as various styling elements.

credits.maintainers.ahkimn.description.message: Maintains the wiki and documentation as well as the Map Manager.

credits.maintainers.kronifer.description.message: Lead developer and maintainer of the Map Manager and maintainer of the wiki.

credits.pageDescription.message: Subway Builder Modded is a community-driven project made possible by these dedicated contributors.

credits.pageSubtitle.message: Subway Builder Modded is a community-driven project made possible by dedicated contributors.

homepage.directory.description.message: Explore the new unified wiki and find the right docs section quickly.

homepage.install.description.message: Step-by-step guide to installing custom maps using Kronifer's Map Patcher.

homepage.create.description.message: Step-by-step workflow for generating, packaging, and shipping custom maps.

homepage.updates.description.message: Stay up to date with new releases from the Subway Builder Modded Team.

homepage.modding.description.message: Build your own mods using our Mod Template.

homepage.meta.description.message: The complete hub for everything modded in Subway Builder.

homepage.hero.subtitle.message: The complete hub for everything modded in Subway Builder.

railyard.feature.browse.desc.message: Browse hundreds of community-made maps of cities from around the world.

railyard.feature.browse.bullet1.message: Find maps by size, data, and region.

railyard.feature.browse.bullet2.message: Sort and toggle your maps easily.

railyard.feature.browse.bullet3.message: Install directly from one polished app experience.

railyard.feature.install.desc.message: From adding 500+ new trains to seeing detailed demand data by region, there's a mod for anything you desire.

railyard.feature.install.bullet1.message: Browse and add gameplay mods quickly.

railyard.feature.install.bullet2.message: Keep your favorites organized in one place.

railyard.feature.install.bullet3.message: Spend more time playing, less time configuring.

railyard.feature.manage.desc.message: No more messing around with your system's file manager. Click the download button for the map or mod you want to play and let Railyard do the rest.

railyard.feature.updates.desc.message: Want to test a mod or disable something for a specific playthrough? You can simply disable the mod and just enable it later with one simple click.

railyard.feature.updates.bullet1.message: Toggle content instantly for each run.

railyard.feature.updates.bullet3.message: Keep stable setups ready whenever you want.

railyard.workflow.find.desc.message: Browse curated maps and mods from the community.

railyard.workflow.install.desc.message: Choose what you want and install it quickly.

railyard.workflow.manage.desc.message: Enable or disable content anytime for each playthrough.

The all-in-one tool for downloading and.message: The all-in-one tool for downloading and managing your Subway Builder mods and cities.

railyard.hero.subtitle.message: The easiest way to discover, install, and manage Subway Builder community content.

railyard.workflow.header.message: From Download to Play in Three Stops
